task_completion.description: Navigate to the DevOps Automation project in OpenProject
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenProject interface is visible with 'DevOps Automation' displayed in the project header, sidebar, or breadcrumbs.

task_completion.description: Locate and open the specific work package
task_completion.visual_evidence: The work package titled 'Implement blue-green deployment strategy' is visible, either in a work package list or opened in the detailed view.
The date '2025-05-01' (or equivalent format like '05/01/2025' or 'May 1, 2025') is entered into the start date field or selected in the date picker for this work package.
The date '2025-05-31' (or equivalent format like '05/31/2025' or 'May 31, 2025') is entered into the due/finish date field or selected in the date picker for this work package.

task_completion.description: Save and confirm the updated dates
task_completion.visual_evidence: The work package details view shows the updated start date and due date in a saved/read-only state, or a success notification/toast is visible confirming the update.

integrity.description: Agent used a web browser to interact with the application
integrity.visual_evidence: A web browser window is visible with 'localhost:8080' in the address bar, rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the genuine OpenProject interface
integrity.visual_evidence: The standard OpenProject UI elements (menus, sidebars, work package tables) are visible, not a text editor or mocked HTML page.

integrity.description: Agent did not just paste the expected output into a random text field
integrity.visual_evidence: The dates are entered specifically into the OpenProject date picker or work package date fields, not typed into a search bar, URL bar, or unrelated text area.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target work package is 'Implement blue-green deployment strategy' in the 'DevOps Automation' project. The start date must be exactly 2025-05-01 and the due date must be exactly 2025-05-31. Accept standard regional date format variations (e.g., 05/01/2025, May 1, 2025) as long as they represent the correct days.
